blockingIssues.description: `src/resources/responses.rs:219` models non-stream response output items too narrowly, dropping canonical tool/function-call fields such as `name`, `arguments`, `call_id`, and `status`, so create/retrieve/cancel do not faithfully surface tool-calling responses.
`src/resources/responses.rs:234` only deserializes `text` content parts, so refusal payloads lose their `refusal` explanation when parsing canonical non-stream response content.

`src/resources/responses.rs:786` parses structured output from `response.output_text()` after concatenating all output-text blocks, which turns valid multi-block structured responses into invalid JSON and breaks `VAL-RESP-013`.

`Responses::stream` and `resume_stream` buffer the entire SSE response body via `execute_text*` before constructing `ResponseStream`, so callers cannot consume deltas incrementally and `abort()` cannot stop the underlying request.

`src/resources/responses.rs:1004` re-applies `starting_after` using a local ordinal instead of the API event `sequence_number`, so resumed background streams can drop valid server events and corrupt the final snapshot.

appliedUpdates.description: Added a factual note to `.factory/library/api-surface.md` that Responses background resume uses server `sequence_number` values for `starting_after`, so future workers key resume filtering off event sequence numbers rather than local ordinals.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit non-interactive exec-mode guidance to `sdk-surface-worker`: allow internal design analysis in place of a user-approval brainstorming gate, and clarify when representative example updates are mandatory versus out-of-scope so workers can satisfy the procedure without conflicting with mission exec instructions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All five primary-generation surface reviews recorded the brainstorming approval gate as a procedure mismatch in exec mode, and the review for `responses-streaming-state-machine-and-structured-streams` additionally flagged that step 6's representative-example requirement conflicts with mission instructions to do only the requested work and avoid unrelated docs/README changes.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated per-feature brainstorming-gate observations from the other primary-generation reviews.
